items.title: Americans are 'entrenched' in financial stress amid debt and price pressures
items.title_zh: 美国人在债务和价格压力下，财务压力依然严重
items.summary: 未调用大模型，以下为原文关键信息摘录：Economic conditions like gas prices well above $4 a gallon, according to AAA estimates, and annual inflation nearing 4%, per the Bureau of Labor Statistics, are pushing Americans' financial stress levels higher.；The National Foundation for Credit Counseling expects Americans' economic stress levels to tick back up in the second quarter of the year after a slight fall in the first quarter, according to its quarterly Financial Stress Forecast released on Wednesday.；The forecast considers data on consumer counseling behavior as well as other broader economic indicators to predict trends in Americans' financial stability.
important_points: Economic conditions like gas prices well above $4 a gallon, according to AAA estimates, and annual inflation nearing 4%, per the Bureau of Labor Statistics, are pushing Americans' financial stress levels higher.

The National Foundation for Credit Counseling expects Americans' economic stress levels to tick back up in the second quarter of the year after a slight fall in the first quarter, according to its quarterly Financial Stress Forecast released on Wednesday.
The forecast considers data on consumer counseling behavior as well as other broader economic indicators to predict trends in Americans' financial stability.

items.title: 跨境券商内地存量业务或超2500亿，出清如何影响港股、中概股？
items.title_zh: 跨境券商内地存量业务或超2500亿，出清如何影响港股、中概股？
items.summary: 未调用大模型，以下为原文关键信息摘录：{{aisd}} AI生成 免责声明 伴随富途控股、老虎证券、长桥证券等在中国内地非法跨境展业被全面封堵，市场将目光聚焦在了存量业务清理可能带来的市场冲击上。；根据证监会等八部门要求，相关机构应在2年集中整治期内分阶段停止境外机构相关境内服务，其间存量投资者只能单向卖出交易并转出资金。在此背景下，市场上关于部分港股、在美上市中概股将遭遇单向卖出、接盘力量减弱等讨论不断。；对此，有机构人士对第一财经表示，这些非法存量业务清理带来的具体影响目前还难以准确测算，最终要看跨境券商实际执行情况。另有资深投资人士测算称，富途控股、老虎证券两家主要跨境券商的中国内地客户持有资产规模合计在3000亿港元（约合2500多亿元人民币）以下，影响有限且释放需要过程，但要考虑短期内市场恐慌情绪的放大效应。长期来看，那些被低估且纳入港股通的个股，可能会因此迎来新的布局机会。
important_points: {{aisd}} AI生成 免责声明 伴随富途控股、老虎证券、长桥证券等在中国内地非法跨境展业被全面封堵，市场将目光聚焦在了存量业务清理可能带来的市场冲击上。
根据证监会等八部门要求，相关机构应在2年集中整治期内分阶段停止境外机构相关境内服务，其间存量投资者只能单向卖出交易并转出资金。在此背景下，市场上关于部分港股、在美上市中概股将遭遇单向卖出、接盘力量减弱等讨论不断。
对此，有机构人士对第一财经表示，这些非法存量业务清理带来的具体影响目前还难以准确测算，最终要看跨境券商实际执行情况。另有资深投资人士测算称，富途控股、老虎证券两家主要跨境券商的中国内地客户持有资产规模合计在3000亿港元（约合2500多亿元人民币）以下，影响有限且释放需要过程，但要考虑短期内市场恐慌情绪的放大效应。长期来看，那些被低估且纳入港股通的个股，可能会因此迎来新的布局机会。

items.title: 美联储换帅难解“既要又要”经济困局
items.title_zh: 美联储换帅难解“既要又要”经济困局
items.summary: 未调用大模型，以下为原文关键信息摘录：{{aisd}} AI生成 免责声明 美联储主席更替正在成为观察美国经济走向的重要窗口。市场都在关注，沃什接任美联储主席后，美国会不会更快降息、美元利率会不会回落、全球流动性会不会改善。；但如果把这一变化简单理解为“换一个主席、换一套政策、美国经济由此转入宽松周期”，显然低估了美国经济面临的深层矛盾。；美联储换帅或许会改变美国货币政策的表达方式和操作节奏，却很难改变美国经济在通胀、债务、财政、金融市场和政治分裂之间艰难平衡的基本格局。
important_points: {{aisd}} AI生成 免责声明 美联储主席更替正在成为观察美国经济走向的重要窗口。市场都在关注，沃什接任美联储主席后，美国会不会更快降息、美元利率会不会回落、全球流动性会不会改善。
但如果把这一变化简单理解为“换一个主席、换一套政策、美国经济由此转入宽松周期”，显然低估了美国经济面临的深层矛盾。
美联储换帅或许会改变美国货币政策的表达方式和操作节奏，却很难改变美国经济在通胀、债务、财政、金融市场和政治分裂之间艰难平衡的基本格局。

items.title: Millennials spend $252 on an average date, BMO finds — and social media is spiraling over 'date-flation'
items.title_zh: Millennials spend $252 on an average date, BMO finds — and social media is spiraling over 'date-flation'
items.summary: 未调用大模型，以下为原文关键信息摘录：Inflation concerns are spilling into "date-flation" discussions online, as social media users react to a surprising stat: Millennials spend $252, on average, for a date.；The figure, which CNBC reported on in April, comes from BMO Financial Group's 2026 BMO Real Financial Progress Index.；The average "all-in" spend on a date in America — including pre-date grooming and gas money, as well as the cost of the date itself — has climbed to $189, up 12.5% from last year, BMO found.
important_points: Inflation concerns are spilling into "date-flation" discussions online, as social media users react to a surprising stat: Millennials spend $252, on average, for a date.
The figure, which CNBC reported on in April, comes from BMO Financial Group's 2026 BMO Real Financial Progress Index.
The average "all-in" spend on a date in America — including pre-date grooming and gas money, as well as the cost of the date itself — has climbed to $189, up 12.5% from last year, BMO found.

items.title: Americans are feeling inflation's pinch into the holiday weekend. Here's where prices are rising the most

important_points: U.S.
consumers will shell out more for everything from fuel to hot dogs and hamburgers heading into Memorial Day weekend as the Iran War reignites inflation.
Total inflation for shoppers rose 3.8% in April from the same month a year ago, the highest annual rate since 2023, according to federal government data released this month.

items.title: 道指涨近300点创新高，芯片股爆发高通狂飙12%，富途、老虎证券市值蒸发超1/4

items.summary: 未调用大模型，以下为原文关键信息摘录：{{aisd}} AI生成 免责声明 *三大股指收高，标普500指数周线八连阳； *中长期美债收益率分化，2年期美债重回4.10%以上； *雅诗兰黛涨近12%，公司放弃收购西班牙美妆公司Puig。；周五美股全线上涨，市场观望长达近三个月的美伊冲突谈判进展影响，美债收益率回落提振风险偏好。截至收盘，道指涨294.04点，涨幅0.58%，报50579.70点，纳指涨0.19%，报26343.97点，标普500指数涨0.37%，报7473.47点。；标普500指数实现连续第八周收涨，创下2023年12月以来最长连涨周期。道琼斯指数盘中创下2月10日以来新高。
important_points: {{aisd}} AI生成 免责声明 *三大股指收高，标普500指数周线八连阳； *中长期美债收益率分化，2年期美债重回4.10%以上； *雅诗兰黛涨近12%，公司放弃收购西班牙美妆公司Puig。
周五美股全线上涨，市场观望长达近三个月的美伊冲突谈判进展影响，美债收益率回落提振风险偏好。截至收盘，道指涨294.04点，涨幅0.58%，报50579.70点，纳指涨0.19%，报26343.97点，标普500指数涨0.37%，报7473.47点。
标普500指数实现连续第八周收涨，创下2023年12月以来最长连涨周期。道琼斯指数盘中创下2月10日以来新高。

items.title: 沃什接棒第11任美联储主席！特朗普：别看我的脸色
items.title_zh: 沃什接棒第11任美联储主席！特朗普：别看我的脸色
items.summary: 未调用大模型，以下为原文关键信息摘录：{{aisd}} AI生成 免责声明 当地时间周五，美国总统特朗普在白宫为即将上任的美联储主席凯文・沃什举行宣誓就职仪式。这是自1987年艾伦・格林斯潘以来，首次在白宫举行美联储主席宣誓仪式。；面对复杂的经济环境和特朗普潜在的压力，这位新任美联储主席如何掌舵联邦公开市场委员会FOMC，大约四周后的政策会议首秀或可初见端倪。；美联储新时代 就职仪式在白宫东厅举行。特朗普发表长篇致辞后，美国最高法院克拉伦斯・托马斯大法官主持宣誓。现场云集内阁高官，包括财政部长斯科特・贝森特，以及沃什的多年挚友，如前国务卿康多莉扎・赖斯。
important_points: {{aisd}} AI生成 免责声明 当地时间周五，美国总统特朗普在白宫为即将上任的美联储主席凯文・沃什举行宣誓就职仪式。这是自1987年艾伦・格林斯潘以来，首次在白宫举行美联储主席宣誓仪式。
面对复杂的经济环境和特朗普潜在的压力，这位新任美联储主席如何掌舵联邦公开市场委员会FOMC，大约四周后的政策会议首秀或可初见端倪。
美联储新时代 就职仪式在白宫东厅举行。特朗普发表长篇致辞后，美国最高法院克拉伦斯・托马斯大法官主持宣誓。现场云集内阁高官，包括财政部长斯科特・贝森特，以及沃什的多年挚友，如前国务卿康多莉扎・赖斯。

items.title: Kevin Warsh's real Fed 'regime change' may happen deep inside Wall Street's plumbing
items.title_zh: Kevin Warsh's real Fed 'regime change' may happen deep inside Wall Street's plumbing
items.summary: 未调用大模型，以下为原文关键信息摘录：Incoming Federal Reserve Chair Kevin Warsh's talk about "regime change" at the central bank has generated speculation about everything from interest rates to major personnel changes to fundamental alterations in the way it operates and communicates.；But what that eventually might look like is subtler though perhaps more consequential – a rethink of how the Fed manages the financial plumbing in the U.S.；economy and the mammoth balance sheet it has built through some 18 years of crisis fighting.
important_points: Incoming Federal Reserve Chair Kevin Warsh's talk about "regime change" at the central bank has generated speculation about everything from interest rates to major personnel changes to fundamental alterations in the way it operates and communicates.
But what that eventually might look like is subtler though perhaps more consequential – a rethink of how the Fed manages the financial plumbing in the U.S.
economy and the mammoth balance sheet it has built through some 18 years of crisis fighting.

items.title: Despite murky legal landscape, companies are undeterred in their prediction market investments
items.title_zh: 尽管法律模糊，企业仍坚定投资预测市场
items.summary: 尽管法律环境复杂，企业仍在积极投资预测市场，平台持续增长。各州与CFTC展开法律争端， seventeen 州挑战公司运营。市场参与者依靠体育业务辩护监管权，投资者信心依然强劲。
important_points: 州与联邦政府争夺预测市场监管权
17州挑战公司运营，法规争议持续
企业依靠体育业务辩护监管能力
投资者对平台未来仍持积极态度

items.title: Surge in 'risk-free' treasury yields sends bond investors in search of better opportunities
items.title_zh: ‘无风险’国债收益率上升引发投资者调整
items.summary: 美国国债收益率飙升，促使投资者重新评估风险资产。10年期国债收益率近一年未触及新高，30年期收益率也跃升至历史峰值。市场预期联邦储备委员会可能未降息，利率上升可能性增加。投资者需关注政策变化与风险管理。
important_points: 国债收益率上升打破历史记录
投资者重新评估安全资产配置
联邦储备委员会政策不确定性增加
利率上升可能性增强

items.title: What the AvalonBay, Equity Residential megamerger means for the apartment industry and rents
items.title_zh: AvalonBay 与 Equity Residential 合并对房地产行业的影响
items.summary: 这次大型房地产投资信托合并将美国最大房地产公司之一，创造超过180万套租房，预计市场资本化达5.2亿美元。合并后将提升盈利能力和股东价值。分析显示，股价低于净资产价值，具备被收购的潜力。行业专家认为合并有助于降低运营成本。
important_points: 合并形成规模更大的房地产公司
股价低于净资产价值，吸引收购兴趣
预期提升盈利能力和股东回报
行业专家认为合并具有战略优势

items.title: Miner Perpetua Resources secures $2.9 billion U.S. loan for Idaho gold, antimony project
items.title_zh: 矿业公司获得29亿美元贷款
items.summary: 美国出口-进口银行为Perpetua Resources提供29亿美元贷款，支持其Idaho金矿项目。此融资是EXIM计划的最大贷款，反映美国争夺关键矿产。公司股价上涨12%以上，显示市场关注。抗硫化物生产将助力国防和高科技产业。
important_points: 美国政府加大对关键矿产的投资
抗硫化物供应将强化国防能力
股价因新闻上涨
政府与企业合作提升产能

items.title: Retail investors get direct access to SpaceX IPO through major brokerage platforms
items.title_zh: 零售投资者通过大中型平台参与SpaceX IPO
items.summary: 零售投资者首次通过知名经纪平台直接参与SpaceX的IPO，改变了传统的投资方式。数据显示，普通投资者将获得与机构投资者同等的股权，价格透明度提升。市场反应积极，显示投资者对SpaceX未来发展的信心。该举措推动IPO流程创新，吸引更多散户参与。
important_points: 零售投资者首次直接参与SpaceX的IPO，提升流动性
交易平台提供同等股权，价格透明，改变传统模式
IPO流程创新，吸引更多散户参与
公司估值持续上升，市场关注度提升

items.title: OpenAI takes the lead in AI IPO horse race: 'Getting to public markets first is very important'
items.title_zh: OpenAI在AIIPO竞赛中走在前列
items.summary: OpenAI预计将首次上市，市场预期显示其估值优势。交易者认为上市顺利能带来显著收益。数据显示，市场对OpenAI的首选地位提升。机构分析师指出，IPO进度影响投资决策。
important_points: OpenAI预计首次上市，市场预期有利
交易者认为上市能带来重要收益
估值设定对投资者产生优势
IPO进度影响机构投资决策

items.title: Fed officials see rate hike ahead if inflation stays elevated, minutes show
items.title_zh: 联邦储备委员会官员预期加息
items.summary: 官员预计若伊朗战争持续加剧通胀，需加息，政策分歧明显。

items.title: House approves breakthrough housing bill in a win for investors
items.title_zh: House approves breakthrough housing bill in a win for investors
items.summary: 未调用大模型，以下为原文关键信息摘录：The U.S.；House by an overwhelming vote of 396-13 approved a bipartisan housing affordability bill Wednesday that would limit major investors from purchasing single-family homes while allowing them to build additional housing units.；The measure is getting support from the White House after some last-minute changes struck a balance between the Senate version, which placed more restrictions on major investors owning homes, and the House version, which was seen as more friendly toward Wall Street.
important_points: The U.S.

House by an overwhelming vote of 396-13 approved a bipartisan housing affordability bill Wednesday that would limit major investors from purchasing single-family homes while allowing them to build additional housing units.

The measure is getting support from the White House after some last-minute changes struck a balance between the Senate version, which placed more restrictions on major investors owning homes, and the House version, which was seen as more friendly toward Wall Street.

items.title: Fed to hike? When traders see a rate increase coming
items.title_zh: 美联储可能加息，市场预期
items.summary: 交易者预测2027年7月可能出现下一次加息，利率走势趋于明确。

items.title: Nvidia earnings call drama: Will Jensen Huang talk 'Trump' and China chips after Xi summit?
items.title_zh: Nvidia财报电话风波：胡翠在特朗普和芯片话题
items.summary: Nvidia的财报电话引发关注，市场预期CEO可能提及特朗普。近期数据显示，芯片销售前景不确定，关税政策影响在讨论中。投资者对公司战略和国际关系的看法发生变化。
important_points: CEO加入特朗普会议，增加舆论关注度
芯片销售前景受中国政策影响
关税政策可能影响市场预期
投资者对公司战略和国际合作的判断变化

items.title: Homebuilder sentiment improves on late spring surge in demand
items.title_zh: Homebuilder sentiment improves on late spring surge in demand
items.summary: 未调用大模型，以下为原文关键信息摘录：Higher mortgage rates, rising gas prices and continued economic uncertainty over the war with Iran are all still weighing on potential homebuyers.；Builders, however, are feeling slightly better about their businesses, seeing a potential late spring surge.；After a sharp drop in April, homebuilder sentiment in the market for single-family homes rose 3 points in May to a readout of 37 on the National Association of Home Builders (NAHB)/Wells Fargo Housing Market Index.
important_points: Higher mortgage rates, rising gas prices and continued economic uncertainty over the war with Iran are all still weighing on potential homebuyers.
Builders, however, are feeling slightly better about their businesses, seeing a potential late spring surge.

After a sharp drop in April, homebuilder sentiment in the market for single-family homes rose 3 points in May to a readout of 37 on the National Association of Home Builders (NAHB)/Wells Fargo Housing Market Index.

items.title: White House touts deals on soybeans and rare earths after Trump-Xi summit, while China talks up tariff cuts
items.title_zh: White House touts deals on soybeans and rare earths after Trump-Xi summit, while China talks up tariff cuts
items.summary: 未调用大模型，以下为原文关键信息摘录：BEIJING — China has agreed to buy U.S.；soybeans and address American access to rare earths, the White House said Sunday, touting some of the most tangible outcomes so far from a high-profile bilateral summit last week.；U.S.
important_points: BEIJING — China has agreed to buy U.S.
soybeans and address American access to rare earths, the White House said Sunday, touting some of the most tangible outcomes so far from a high-profile bilateral summit last week.
U.S.

items.title: One of the market's hottest stock themes is buying everything AI can't replace
items.title_zh: One of the market's hottest stock themes is buying everything AI can't replace
items.summary: 未调用大模型，以下为原文关键信息摘录：As investors worry about all of the companies that AI will wipe out, they are rotating into the ones that AI will have a harder time disrupting.；And the HALO trade, as it is called, is working.；HALO, which stands for "heavy assets, low obsolescence," was coined by Josh Brown, co-founder and CEO of Ritholtz Wealth Management, in February, premised on the idea that an era of rapid AI disruption requires a search by investors for companies that are immune to it.
important_points: As investors worry about all of the companies that AI will wipe out, they are rotating into the ones that AI will have a harder time disrupting.
And the HALO trade, as it is called, is working.

HALO, which stands for "heavy assets, low obsolescence," was coined by Josh Brown, co-founder and CEO of Ritholtz Wealth Management, in February, premised on the idea that an era of rapid AI disruption requires a search by investors for companies that are immune to it.

items.title: Kevin Warsh comes into the Fed facing a big 'family fight' over cutting interest rates
items.title_zh: 新任主席面临激烈的政策选择
items.summary: 新任主席需在通胀与就业之间权衡，加息或降息的抉择关键。

items.title: Mortgage rates jump to highest level since March on hotter inflation reports
items.title_zh: Mortgage rates jump to highest level since March on hotter inflation reports
items.summary: 未调用大模型，以下为原文关键信息摘录：An exceptionally hot read on inflation early Wednesday, the government's Producer Price Index, or PPI, sent bond yields higher, and mortgage rates followed.；Rates had already been surging higher earlier this week on news of more trouble in negotiations over the Iran war.；The average rate on the popular 30-year fixed mortgage rose Wednesday to 6.57%, according to Mortgage News Daily.
important_points: An exceptionally hot read on inflation early Wednesday, the government's Producer Price Index, or PPI, sent bond yields higher, and mortgage rates followed.
Rates had already been surging higher earlier this week on news of more trouble in negotiations over the Iran war.
The average rate on the popular 30-year fixed mortgage rose Wednesday to 6.57%, according to Mortgage News Daily.

items.title: Credit card debt dips to $1.25 trillion — but maintains ‘K-shaped’ pattern, New York Fed research shows
items.title_zh: Credit card debt dips to $1.25 trillion — but maintains ‘K-shaped’ pattern, New York Fed research shows
items.summary: 未调用大模型，以下为原文关键信息摘录：Credit card balances fell in the first quarter of 2026, decreasing by $25 billion, to $1.25 trillion, according to a new report on household debt by the Federal Reserve Bank of New York released Tuesday.；Still, that's a 5.9% jump from a year earlier.；At the same time, mortgage debt, auto loans and home equity lines of credit were all higher, the New York Fed found.
important_points: Credit card balances fell in the first quarter of 2026, decreasing by $25 billion, to $1.25 trillion, according to a new report on household debt by the Federal Reserve Bank of New York released Tuesday.
Still, that's a 5.9% jump from a year earlier.
At the same time, mortgage debt, auto loans and home equity lines of credit were all higher, the New York Fed found.

items.title: The wealthy keep buying Manhattan real estate despite potential pied-à-terre tax
items.title_zh: The wealthy keep buying Manhattan real estate despite potential pied-à-terre tax
items.summary: 未调用大模型，以下为原文关键信息摘录：High-end real estate sales in Manhattan increased in the past month, according to new data, despite New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani's proposed pied-à-terre tax that brokers warn could cause a wealth flight.；There were 133 contracts signed for apartments priced at $4 million or more between April 14 and May 10, according to Olshan Realty.；That compares with 130 during the same period last year.
important_points: High-end real estate sales in Manhattan increased in the past month, according to new data, despite New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani's proposed pied-à-terre tax that brokers warn could cause a wealth flight.
There were 133 contracts signed for apartments priced at $4 million or more between April 14 and May 10, according to Olshan Realty.
That compares with 130 during the same period last year.

items.title: Warsh's take on Fed independence is met with confusion and some concern
items.title_zh: Warsh's take on Fed independence is met with confusion and some concern
items.summary: 未调用大模型，以下为原文关键信息摘录：Most people don't know and don't have much reason to care what a currency swap line is, except that the financial instrument could soon help markets understand what Federal Reserve Chair nominee Kevin Warsh's unique ideas about Fed independence really mean.；Warsh has said categorically the Fed should be "strictly independent" in the making of monetary policy.；But he adds that he's willing to work with Congress and the Trump administration on "non-monetary matters." In answers to senators' questions following his April 21 confirmation hearing, he elaborated: "Fed officials are not entitled to the same special deference in areas affecting international finance, among other matters." Warsh has also talked often about a new "Fed/Treasury accord" that he's suggested could govern the Fed's balance sheet, though in ways he has yet to detail.
important_points: Most people don't know and don't have much reason to care what a currency swap line is, except that the financial instrument could soon help markets understand what Federal Reserve Chair nominee Kevin Warsh's unique ideas about Fed independence really mean.
Warsh has said categorically the Fed should be "strictly independent" in the making of monetary policy.

But he adds that he's willing to work with Congress and the Trump administration on "non-monetary matters." In answers to senators' questions following his April 21 confirmation hearing, he elaborated: "Fed officials are not entitled to the same special deference in areas affecting international finance, among other matters." Warsh has also talked often about a new "Fed/Treasury accord" that he's suggested could govern the Fed's balance sheet, though in ways he has yet to detail.

items.title: Fed holds interest rates steady: Here's what that means for credit cards, mortgages, car loans and savings rates
items.title_zh: 公司、机构、产品名称保留英文，简洁自然的中文翻译
items.summary: 未调用大模型，以下为原文关键信息摘录：The Federal Reserve held interest rates steady at the conclusion of its policy meeting on Wednesday.；In what could be Jerome Powell's last as chair before President Donald Trump's yet-to-be-confirmed nominee Kevin Warsh takes the helm, central bankers maintained the federal funds rate in a target range of 3.5% to 3.75%.；Inflation has surged since the war with Iran began, leaving policymakers with limited room to act, according to Sean Snaith, the director of the University of Central Florida's Institute for Economic Forecasting.
important_points: The Federal Reserve held interest rates steady at the conclusion of its policy meeting on Wednesday.

In what could be Jerome Powell's last as chair before President Donald Trump's yet-to-be-confirmed nominee Kevin Warsh takes the helm, central bankers maintained the federal funds rate in a target range of 3.5% to 3.75%.

Inflation has surged since the war with Iran began, leaving policymakers with limited room to act, according to Sean Snaith, the director of the University of Central Florida's Institute for Economic Forecasting.

items.title: Mortgage rates surge to nearly four-week high as Iran headlines impact markets
items.title_zh: Mortgage rates surge to nearly four-week high as Iran headlines impact markets
items.summary: 未调用大模型，以下为原文关键信息摘录：After basically flatlining for the last few weeks, mortgage rates moved decidedly higher Wednesday after President Trump said he would maintain the U.S.；naval blockade against Iran until they agreed to a nuclear deal.；That sent oil prices higher, and bond yields followed.
important_points: After basically flatlining for the last few weeks, mortgage rates moved decidedly higher Wednesday after President Trump said he would maintain the U.S.
naval blockade against Iran until they agreed to a nuclear deal.
That sent oil prices higher, and bond yields followed.

items.title: Fed is likely to hold rates steady — here's how that impacts consumer costs
items.title_zh: Fed is likely to hold rates steady — here's how that impacts consumer costs
items.summary: 未调用大模型，以下为原文关键信息摘录：The Federal Reserve is on the cusp of a "regime change" after the Department of Justice dropped its criminal investigation into Fed Chair Jerome Powell, eliminating a potential obstacle to confirming President Donald Trump's nominee, Kevin Warsh, to replace him.；Central bankers are expected to hold interest rates steady at their policy meeting next week — likely Powell's last as chair — doing little to ease consumers' current affordability challenges.；With an inflation shock, a war with Iran and an uncertain labor market, futures market pricing is implying virtually no chance of a rate cut, according to the CME Group's FedWatch gauge.
important_points: The Federal Reserve is on the cusp of a "regime change" after the Department of Justice dropped its criminal investigation into Fed Chair Jerome Powell, eliminating a potential obstacle to confirming President Donald Trump's nominee, Kevin Warsh, to replace him.
Central bankers are expected to hold interest rates steady at their policy meeting next week — likely Powell's last as chair — doing little to ease consumers' current affordability challenges.
With an inflation shock, a war with Iran and an uncertain labor market, futures market pricing is implying virtually no chance of a rate cut, according to the CME Group's FedWatch gauge.

Joining their ranks will cost you at least $1 million, according to a new list of luxury housing markets by Realtor.com.
Nearly all of Nantucket's active listings are priced at $1 million or higher with a median listing price of $4.08 million, the real estate platform found.
